//: ALTERNATIVE setup — no Dockerfile. Rename this file to devcontainer.json to use it.
//install: Uses onCreateCommand so the install is cached in prebuilds. Lighter to maintain, but apt system packages (ffmpeg/poppler) are not included.
name: MarkItDown Dev Environment (no Dockerfile)
onCreateCommand: pip install 'markitdown[all]' && markitdown --version && az version && aws --version && terraform version
